## Artifacts Generated by red-hot_rebis Tools

### 1. Gene Imscriber — 7-Gene Edit Analysis
- `gene_imscriber_results.json` — Full B4 lattice analysis for all 7 human target gene edits
- 7 genes: COL1A2 (reflectin), OPN4 (opsin), CHRNA7 (nAChR motor), ACTB (papilla), NEUROD1 (neurogenesis), CHR2 (optogenetic), VEGFA (vasculature)

### 2. Serpentrod — 5 Cephalopod Protein Analyses
- `serpentrod_results.json` — Processing predictions + cleavage site maps
- `fasta/REFLECTIN_A1.fasta` — 428 aa, Euprymna scolopes
- `fasta/CEPHALOPOD_OPSIN.fasta` — 353 aa, Octopus bimaculoides
- `fasta/nAChR_ALPHA7_MOTOR.fasta` — 403 aa, Sepia officinalis
- `fasta/PAPILLIN_HYDROSTAT.fasta` — 232 aa, Octopus vulgaris
- `fasta/NEUROGENIN_OCTOPUS.fasta` — 228 aa, Octopus bimaculoides

### 3. CH3MPILER — 7 Compound IUPAC/CAS Analyses
- `ch3mpiler_results.json` — CAS resolution + IG type analysis
- Resolved: 11-cis-retinal (C20H28O), acetylcholine (C7H16NO2+), dopachrome (C9H7NO4)
- Macromolecular: reflectin A1, silk fibroin hydrogel, channelrhodopsin-2, VEGF-A165

### 4. Protein Structure — 6 PDB Backbone Models
- `pdb/REFLECTIN_A1.pdb` — 133,539 B, 359 residues
- `pdb/CEPHALOPOD_OPSIN.pdb` — 92,993 B, 236 residues
- `pdb/nAChR_ALPHA7_MOTOR.pdb` — 92,638 B, 233 residues
- `pdb/PAPILLIN_HYDROSTAT.pdb` — 45,834 B, 116 residues
- `pdb/NEUROGENIN_OCTOPUS.pdb` — 39,198 B, 116 residues
- `pdb/VEGF165_HUMAN.pdb` — 75,713 B, 191 residues

### 5. CLINK Actionable Organism Package (L0–L8)
- `actionable_organism/L0/` — Hadron spectrum, QCD coupling (subatomic)
- `actionable_organism/L1/` — B4 nucleotide lattice, electron configurations (orbital)
- `actionable_organism/L2/` — Atomic parameters, isotopes (atom)
- `actionable_organism/L3/` — Molecular properties, SMILES, reactions, retrosynthetic pathways (molecule)
- `actionable_organism/L4/` — Protein FASTA, PDB coordinates, secondary structure, serpentrod classification (cell)
- `actionable_organism/L5/` — Plasmid GenBank (.gb), SBOL construct (.sbol), codon usage, genome FASTA/GFF, metabolic model (mitosis)
- `actionable_organism/L6/` — Cell cycle parameters, mitosis assay protocol (meiosis)
- `actionable_organism/L7/` — Cell type ratios, ECM composition, growth factors, organoid protocol, scaffold parameters (tissue/organ)
- `actionable_organism/L8/` — Whole organism layer (ground-up CLINK design manifest)

### 6. CLINK Ground-Up Design
- `clink_design_ground_up.json` — Full L0→L8 synthesis path: 23.3188 total distance, 36 promotions

### 7. P4rakernel Organoid Bridge
- `p4rakernel_results.json` — (to be completed with OrganoidAugmentation analysis)

## Reflectin Spectrum

Reflectin A1 is Φ-dominant (Parity, 77.1% of activated primitives). The tandem (GRY)n repeats interspersed with (GHY)n nodes create a photonic bandgap via the aromatic residues Tyr/Trp — exactly the structural basis for cephalopod iridescence.
